${modID}:Wavebreaker.NAME: Wavebreaker
${modID}:Wavebreaker.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL If ${modID}:Sunken, deal !${modID}:damage2! damage to ALL enemies.

${modID}:Typhoon.NAME: Typhoon
${modID}:Typhoon.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies X times. NL If ${modID}:Lethal, ${modID}:Submerge 2.

${modID}:SeaMines.NAME: Sea Mines
${modID}:SeaMines.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Draw 1 card. NL If ${modID}:Sunken, add a copy of this card into your discard pile. NL ${modID}:Trawl.

${modID}:CrushDepth.NAME: Crush Depth
${modID}:CrushDepth.DESCRIPTION: Shuffle a copy of this into your draw pile. NL ${modID}:Abyssal - Deal !M! damage to ALL enemies. NL ${modID}:Trawl. NL ${modID}:Ballast.

${modID}:GreatBarrierReef.NAME: Great Barrier Reef
${modID}:GreatBarrierReef.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL Add ${modID}:Ballast to all the "Reef" cards in your discard pile.

${modID}:Reverberation.NAME: Reverberation
${modID}:Reverberation.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies twice. NL ${modID}:Ballast.

${modID}:LeadBoots.NAME: Lead Boots
${modID}:LeadBoots.DESCRIPTION: At the start of your turn, ${modID}:Submerge !M!.

${modID}:Calcify.NAME: Calcify
${modID}:Calcify.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Summon 2 ${modID}:Barnacles and draw 1 card. NL If ${modID}:Sunken, summon 1 ${modID}:Barnacle.

${modID}:TidePool.NAME: Tide Pool
${modID}:TidePool.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL If ${modID}:Sunken, NL gain !${modID}:block2! Block. NL ${modID}:Abyssal - Gain !${modID}:block2! Block.

${modID}:GlowingTrident.NAME: Glowing Trident
${modID}:GlowingTrident.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. If ${modID}:Sunken, costs 1 less [E] this combat.

${modID}:RemoraSlash.NAME: Remora Slash
${modID}:RemoraSlash.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies. NL ${modID}:Abyssal - Add this card to your hand.

${modID}:Harvester.NAME: Harvester
${modID}:Harvester.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Deals double damage if it would kill.

${modID}:Infestation.NAME: Infestation
${modID}:Infestation.DESCRIPTION: If ${modID}:Sunken, summon 1 ${modID}:Barnacle and put a copy of this on top of your draw pile. NL Exhaust.
${modID}:Infestation.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: If ${modID}:Sunken, summon 2 ${modID}:Barnacles and put a copy of this on top of your draw pile. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:KelpWall.NAME: Kelp Wall
${modID}:KelpWall.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL Whenever you are attacked this turn, summon 1 ${modID}:Barnacle.

${modID}:Hardening.NAME: Hardening
${modID}:Hardening.DESCRIPTION: Whenever an enemy dies, gain !M! Strength.

${modID}:Blitzkrieg.NAME: Blitzkrieg
${modID}:Blitzkrieg.DESCRIPTION: Shuffle ALL cards into your draw pile, then ${modID}:Submerge them, twice. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:Nautilus.NAME: The Nautilus
${modID}:Nautilus.DESCRIPTION: Ethereal. NL Whenever a ${modID}:Barnacle dies, gain [E].

${modID}:AnchorCrash.NAME: Anchor Crash
${modID}:AnchorCrash.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL ${modID}:Submerge !M!. NL If ${modID}:Sunken, NL ${modID}:Submerge !M!.

${modID}:CatchAndRelease.NAME: Catch And Release
${modID}:CatchAndRelease.DESCRIPTION: ${modID}:Submerge 5. NL Draw !M! cards. NL If ${modID}:Sunken, draw !M! cards next turn.

${modID}:Trout.NAME: Trout
${modID}:Trout.DESCRIPTION: Gain !M! Strength. NL If ${modID}:Sunken, add a copy of this card into your discard pile.

${modID}:Doubloons.NAME: Doubloons
${modID}:Doubloons.DESCRIPTION: Gain [E]. NL If ${modID}:Sunken, gain [E] [E] next turn.
${modID}:Doubloons.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Gain [E]. NL If ${modID}:Sunken, gain [E] [E] [E] next turn.

${modID}:AquaticTopaz.NAME: Aquatic Topaz
${modID}:AquaticTopaz.DESCRIPTION: Start each combat with this card in your discard pile. NL Gain [E]. NL Draw !M! card. NL Exhaust.
${modID}:AquaticTopaz.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Start each combat with this card in your discard pile. NL Gain [E]. NL Draw !M! cards. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:ShiftingSeas.NAME: Shifting Seas
${modID}:ShiftingSeas.DESCRIPTION: At the end of your turn, Retain up to 2 cards. NL If ${modID}:Sunken, choose 3 cards in your hand to Retain this turn.

${modID}:ReefBlade.NAME: Reef Blade
${modID}:ReefBlade.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Deal !M! additional damage for ALL your cards with ${modID}:Abyssal.

${modID}:FractalTrench.NAME: Fractal Trench
${modID}:FractalTrench.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage !M! times. NL ${modID}:Abyssal - This hits !${modID}:magic2! additional times this combat.

${modID}:NkuhanasRetort.NAME: N'kuhana's Retort
${modID}:NkuhanasRetort.DESCRIPTION: Shuffle your discard pile into your draw pile. NL At the end of your turn, take an extra turn if your draw pile is empty. NL Exhaust.
${modID}:NkuhanasRetort.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Shuffle your discard pile into your draw pile. NL At the end of your turn, take an extra turn if your draw pile is empty.

${modID}:BeckonedByTheDepths.NAME: Beckoned By The Depths
${modID}:BeckonedByTheDepths.DESCRIPTION: Ethereal. NL Cards cost 0. NL Whenever you play a card, it gains ${modID}:Ballast.
${modID}:BeckonedByTheDepths.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Cards cost 0. NL Whenever you play a card, it gains ${modID}:Ballast.

${modID}:Fathom.NAME: Fathom
${modID}:Fathom.DESCRIPTION: Upgrade this card for the rest of combat. NL ${modID}:Abyssal - ${modID}:Submerge !${modID}:magic!. NL ${modID}:Trawl.

${modID}:FloatingGarbage.NAME: Floating Garbage
${modID}:FloatingGarbage.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL ${modID}:Submerge !M!. NL ${modID}:Dredge !M!. NL ${modID}:Trawl. NL If ${modID}:Lethal, shuffle a copy of this card into your draw pile. NL If ${modID}:Sunken, summon !M! ${modID}:Barnacles.
${modID}:FloatingGarbage.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL ${modID}:Submerge !M!. NL ${modID}:Dredge !M!. NL ${modID}:Trawl. NL ${modID}:Ballast. NL If ${modID}:Lethal, shuffle a copy of this card into your draw pile. NL If ${modID}:Sunken, summon !M! ${modID}:Barnacles. NL ${modID}:Abyssal - Play this card.

${modID}:WashedAway.NAME: Washed Away
${modID}:WashedAway.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL If ${modID}:Sunken, deal !D! damage to the highest HP enemy.

${modID}:Ahoy.NAME: Ahoy!
${modID}:Ahoy.DESCRIPTION: ${modID}:Dredge !M!. NL Add this card to the top of your draw pile. NL ${modID}:Trawl.

${modID}:Crush.NAME: Crush
${modID}:Crush.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies. NL If ${modID}:Lethal, summon 1 ${modID}:Barnacle. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:Dive.NAME: Dive
${modID}:Dive.DESCRIPTION: Look at the top !M! cards of your draw pile. NL Choose to draw or ${modID}:Submerge all of them.

${modID}:Mariculture.NAME: Mariculture
${modID}:Mariculture.DESCRIPTION: Whenever an enemy dies, deal !M! damage to ALL enemies.

${modID}:ThermalVent.NAME: Thermal Vent
${modID}:ThermalVent.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL If ${modID}:Sunken, permanently increase this card's damage by !M! and Exhaust.

${modID}:Cripple.NAME: Cripple
${modID}:Cripple.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL If ${modID}:Lethal, do not Exhaust. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:RippleStrike.NAME: Ripple Strike
${modID}:RippleStrike.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage twice. NL ${modID}:Abyssal - Apply !M! Vulnerable to ALL enemies.

${modID}:SorrowfulRain.NAME: Sorrowful Rain
${modID}:SorrowfulRain.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies. NL If ${modID}:Sunken, apply !M! Weak to ALL enemies.

${modID}:Twilight.NAME: Twilight
${modID}:Twilight.DESCRIPTION: Draw !M! cards. NL Apply 1 Weak. NL If ${modID}:Submerged, costs 0 this turn. NL ${modID}:Trawl.

${modID}:TidalWave.NAME: Tidal Wave
${modID}:TidalWave.DESCRIPTION: Ethereal. NL ${modID}:Trawl. NL ${modID}:Abyssal - Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies.

${modID}:HalyardWhip.NAME: Halyard Whip
${modID}:HalyardWhip.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Add ${modID}:Trawl to the top !M! cards of your draw pile.

${modID}:NemosMap.NAME: Nemo's Map
${modID}:NemosMap.DESCRIPTION: At the end of your turn, gain !M! Block for each enemy in combat. NL ${modID}:Ballast.
${modID}:NemosMap.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: At the end of your turn, gain 1 Block for each enemy in combat.

${modID}:StarboardStrike.NAME: Starboard Strike
${modID}:StarboardStrike.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL ${modID}:Abyssal - Deal !${modID}:damage2! damage to a random enemy.

${modID}:Maritime.NAME: Maritime
${modID}:Maritime.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Apply !M! Weak. NL ${modID}:Ballast.

${modID}:Thalassophobia.NAME: Thalassophobia
${modID}:Thalassophobia.DESCRIPTION: Cards in your discard pile cost 0 this turn. NL Exhaust.
${modID}:Thalassophobia.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Cards in your discard pile cost 0 this turn.

${modID}:RottenCoral.NAME: Rotten Coral
${modID}:RottenCoral.DESCRIPTION: Retain. NL ${modID}:Submerge !M!. NL Draw 1 card. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:BleedingReef.NAME: Bleeding Reef
${modID}:BleedingReef.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Apply !M! Vulnerable. NL ${modID}:Abyssal - Gain !B! Block for ALL of your "Reef" cards.

${modID}:LetVandZone.NAME: Let-Vand Zone
${modID}:LetVandZone.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you shuffle your draw pile, add 1 *Rotten *Coral into your hand.
${modID}:LetVandZone.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Whenever you shuffle your draw pile, add 1 *Rotten *Coral+ into your hand.

${modID}:TranquilWaters.NAME: Tranquil Waters
${modID}:TranquilWaters.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL Apply !M! Vulnerable to ALL enemies. NL ${modID}:Ballast.

${modID}:WateryGraves.NAME: Watery Graves
${modID}:WateryGraves.DESCRIPTION: At the end of your turn, add a random card with ${modID}:Sunken in your discard pile to your hand.
${modID}:WateryGraves.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Innate. NL At the end of your turn, add a random card with ${modID}:Sunken in your discard pile to your hand.

${modID}:Atlantis.NAME: Atlantis
${modID}:Atlantis.DESCRIPTION: Increase the amount of Block this gives by !M! and return this to your hand. NL If ${modID}:Sunken, gain !${modID}:block! Block.

${modID}:Frostwalk.NAME: Frostwalk
${modID}:Frostwalk.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Add X random cards with ${modID}:Sunken from your draw pile to your hand and Retain them.
${modID}:Frostwalk.UPGRADE: Deal !D! damage. NL Add X+1 random cards with ${modID}:Sunken from your draw pile to your hand and Retain them.

${modID}:DeepestDepths.NAME: Deepest Depths
${modID}:DeepestDepths.DESCRIPTION: Choose a card NL in your hand. NL Add a copy of it with ${modID}:Ballast to your hand at the start of your turns.

${modID}:RisingSurge.NAME: Rising Surge
${modID}:RisingSurge.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL If ${modID}:Submerged, this card deals triple damage this turn.

${modID}:VoyagerForm.NAME: Voyager Form
${modID}:VoyagerForm.DESCRIPTION: Play the first !M! cards ${modID}:Submerged each turn.
